title: HG Algae & Mould Remover – Concentrated Patio & Path Cleaner, Green Algae Remover, Stone-Safe Biocide for Paving Slabs & Outdoor Areas - 1L
features: HG Algae and Mould Remover liquid: This powerful biocide surface cleaner helps to kill and remove fungus, mould, lichen, mildew and algae from external surfaces, stone pathways and patios
Effective outdoor cleaner: Removes mould and algae from a wide range of surfaces, including masonry, tiles, roofs, walls, patios, paths, fences, boats, caravans and other exteriors
Slows down regrowth: The mould and mildew remover is ultra effective as a roof tile cleaner, gravestone cleaner or headstone cleaner, reducing regrowth to keep surfaces looking their best
Treats up to 200m2: Once diluted, the algae killer and stone surface protector isn’t harmful to your grass or plants. Easy to use algae cleaner, offering rapid results in just 36 hours
Includes: 1 x HG Algae and Mould Remover, 1L. Discover the full range of HG cleaning products, including HG Mould Remover Spray, multi purpose cleaners and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG Algae and Mould Remover is an effective algae and mildew remover for a variety of outside surfaces. Algae, fungi and mould can build up on patios, walls, roof tiles and concrete surfaces, such as patios, headstones and fencing posts. This effective HG stone and algae cleaner is the ideal patio cleaner, leaving stone pathways, driveways and even plant pots looking their best. This biocide penetrates deep into the surface of the concrete, covering up to 200m2, and helps protect your brickwork against algae building up again. Once diluted, the biocide cleaner won’t kill your plants, so you can keep your garden looking fantastic all year round. Includes: 1 x HG Algae and Mould Remover (1L) How to use: 1. For best results, scrub as much moss as you can from the patio or concrete first 2. Dilute in a watering can or plant sprayer with water, in a ratio of 1:20 3. Apply in dry weather, when there is no rain forecast for the next two days Keep multi surface cleaner out of reach of children. Use biocides safely. Always read the label. Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist household cleaning products and all-purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Directions Dilute 1:20 with water, apply with watering can, broom, scrubbing-brush or plant spray. Apply during dry weather. Do not rinse off. Safety Warning Always apply during dry weather. Do not rinse off. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. Do not use on plants or edible crops. Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local regulations. Box Contains 1 x HG Moss, Algae and Mould Remover 1L See more
